reviews.title: Stay away
reviews.text:
This hotel is infested with cockroaches. 
Was upgraded to a room with a window upon checking in. When I went into room roaches were running from the bed. They switched me room and there was cockroaches there as well. Stay away unless you want to bring back some baby roaches home with you

reviews.title: Felt like a scum
reviews.negatives: When I arrived at the hotel, they told me that my room was not available and suggested another hotel that was subpar and much further away from the beach. I reserved this hotel because it was beachfront. So I cancelled my reservation and scrambled to find a new hotel to stay.

reviews.title: The room is terrible I took some photo to  show my friend how horrible is it so they won’t book
reviews.text: The hotel shouldn’t never be 3 stars it look cheap old and dirty the staff is not friendly I will highly say no to be here for next time to visit...

reviews.title: Deceiving
reviews.positives: Basic
reviews.negatives:
I get mad when I am deceived or taken for an idiot.
The hotel advertised for a room with sea view and that’s why I booked a room with sea view… the photos of the room that I booked show full Seaview…
I get there and I am offered a room with partial sea view… as there is a huge hotel blocking your view… very deceptive… if you offer and show full sea view in your room photos, why do you deceive the world and offer only partial sea views at most

reviews.title: No comment
reviews.text: I have changed my itinerary and I have not stayed in that hotel.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: You get what you pay for

reviews.title: bad service. bad food
reviews.positives: Sun City Hotel Nha Trang

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The hotel is in an nice quiet alley. A couple of restaurants and shops. 
Very convenient for the beach and all downtown. I paid a little extra for ocean view.
reviews.negatives: The pool area is a little off putting and the pool is murky. But still nice and appreciated.

reviews.title: The worst hotel after 5 years of traveling
reviews.text: The entrance to the hotel is in an alley. When I arrived for check-in for the first time, I got stuck at the entrance because a taxi was parked there blocking the way, so I couldn't get through. But since this was an external reason, I didn't complain. I had booked a room in advance, and when I went to the reception to check in, a staff member in a black shirt attended to me. I noticed that the staff's attitude seemed unfriendly. They asked for the reservation code. I had barely read out 4 digits when I noticed no reaction from them as if they were looking for the code. After a moment, the staff asked to see the booking screen. After that, they handed me the room key. When I got to the room, I felt unhappy because in my notes, I had specified a room on a higher floor, but they gave me a room on the 4th floor, while the hotel has 15 floors. The room design looked decent; however, the equipment and items such as bed sheets and towels were not very clean, appearing as if they hadn't been changed after the previous guests. The walls were also dirty, which looked unappealing. In the evening, while I was in the room, I saw a cockroach crawling around, a really terrifying experience because if I were sleeping and it crawled onto me, what would happen? I give them 1 star for cleanliness and sanitation. The next morning, after I had breakfast and went back to my room to pack up for check-out, I discovered that my helmet was missing. I reported it to the reception desk, asking them to check the camera for me, but I noticed the attitude of the two staff members at the desk was unhelpful. One of them told me to wait for a staff member to check for a bit. Then the two of them whispered to each other, "If the helmet is hung under the bike, it's normal for it to be lost," and "How can we check the camera?" I remember those two sentences clearly. I got angry and left. It was a memorable experience that tarnished Nha Trang's image in my eyes as a tourist. From the service, the experience, to the attitude towards work here made me feel terrible.

reviews.title: Good for the money
reviews.positives: Great location, pool was good, breakfast was good too
reviews.negatives: Bed was hard, staff was not very friendly. Not super clean

reviews.title: STAFF ATTITUDE IS SUPER HYPER BAD!!!
reviews.text: I told the reception at night that I would like to book a car to the airport at the next day 8am early in the morning.Then I told her I haven't get my breakfast ticket , Who knows that her English is poor, misunderstanding that I am going to check out at 3pm in the afternoon . Then drive me away with a bad attitude and tell me no breakfast.WTF!!! Eight and Three is very different!!! You can't understand the simple English??? Then why you become the reception staff?? Why not you go to become the room service staff?? No Need To Communication With CUSTOMER!!! If I really want to check out at 3pm and cannot get my breakfast ticket. You can explain to me! I will listen. No need drive me away! I am human! Not Animal! I know so many Vietnamese didn't like Chinese People. BUT!!! Not all people talking Chinese is come from CHINA! I am come from MALAYSIA! NOT CHINA! Pls don't treat us like an ANIMAL!!! We have paid you MONEY!! Not stay for FREE!! Pls don't show me your BAD FACE!!!

reviews.title: Good trip
reviews.positives:
Location right next the main square at the beach
Next to cloth washer, spa massage
reviews.negatives: The drap in the bed not feel so clean, but acceptable

reviews.title: BAD SERVICE
reviews.text: They keep your passport during your stay, unless you give 300 $ deposit, this information was not on the reservation.  Recepcionist not helpfull, but the manager less

reviews.title: It’s ok after the fridge is cleaned
reviews.positives: Close to the beach & night market
reviews.negatives: Dirty and smelly fridge it’s affecting the whole room,

reviews.title: Really bad
reviews.text:
There are spiders and crock coach everywhere in our room
The view of this hotel is quite bad also
Strange smell in the shower water

reviews.title: Good choice to stay before the late departure to airport
reviews.positives: It was very near the beach and a lot of stores and restaurants, spas around the hotel. The staff of front desk, Mr.SON was exceptionally helpful to us. He was so kind and informative. He arranged us the taxi from the hotel to the airport of reasonable price, no more than Grab taxi. It was a good choice to stay before the departure to airport around 11pm with cheap price.
reviews.negatives: Nothing special. The hotel is some old and needs to be renovated. But the price was so cheap. You can accept it if you choose the price.

reviews.title: STAFF ATTITUDE SUPER HYPER BAD
reviews.text:
I told the reception at night that I would like to book a car to the airport at the next day 8am early in the morning.Then I told her I haven't get my breakfast ticket , Who knows that her English is poor, misunderstanding that I am going to check out at 3pm in the afternoon . Then drive me away with a bad attitude and tell me no breakfast.WTF!!! Eight and Three is very different!!! You can't understand the simple English??? Then why you become the reception staff?? 
Why not you go to become the room service staff?? No Need To Communication With CUSTOMER!!! If I really want to check out at 3pm and cannot get my breakfast ticket. You can explain to me! I will listen. No need drive me away! I am human! Not Animal! I know so many Vietnamese didn't like Chinese People. BUT!!! Not all people talking Chinese is come from CHINA! I am come from MALAYSIA! NOT CHINA! Pls don't treat us like an ANIMAL!!! We have paid you MONEY!! Not stay for FREE!! Pls don't show me your BAD FACE!!!

reviews.title: Good for price
reviews.positives: Walking distance to the beach, good price, supportive staffs at reception and restaurant

reviews.title: Filty dirty.
reviews.text: My room has odor smell. I found ants on my bed.  Roaches in the bathroom sink. The hotel using solar energy, it was take a while to get hot water. Hotel lobby/ elevator have no AC.  Hotel is at good location, closed to the beach!

reviews.title: Excellent value
reviews.positives: Ocean view. Clean and comfortable. Allowed to use a room early. Breakfast very good value at 50k . Down an alley so quiet. Pool was very clean.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Uncomfortable rooms, poor breakfast, nice location
reviews.text: Room service was poor. The bathroom was not properly cleaned. We even got a wet towels upon our check-in. Breakfast was terrible, especially the drink. The room ceiling was quite low. Location is the greatest thing.
reviews.positives: Close to the beach, lots of local food stores nearby, nice receptionists

reviews.title: Lovely
reviews.positives: Great
reviews.negatives: Super

reviews.title: Not worth the money
reviews.text:
We stayed at this hotel for a short while.
Good thing: location. The hotel's located in a good area near Tran Phu Street and the night market.
Bad thing: the room smells really bad which I had to open the door and hall's windows to let the fresh air in. Toilet looks not so clean so I hesitated to use it. The bed sheet was not fresh. I could see the stain and marks on it.
Overall, I would not consider this choice to stay over night. As a place to keep luggage and rest for a short while (few hours), I may think again, but honestly, that's in case I'll choose to stay outside most of the time.

reviews.title: Always my preferred place to stay in Nha Trang
reviews.positives: This is a hotel I’ve stayed in a lot and I’ve always had a good experience. The location is close to places I need to go, there are multiple shops and amenities nearby and it is easy to travel to the hotel from the train station. The staff are more than helpful and friendly. The room is neat and tidy every time and comes with everything I need.
reviews.negatives: Sometimes noise in the corridor was loud, especially in the early evening.

reviews.title: Impossible to sleep in the thin walled room .
reviews.text:
-Erroneous( deceptive?) map location  . Not located on a  street corner across from the ocean as depicted but on a back street accessible only through a  crowded  narrow and somewhat dirty alley .  
- Many rooms had  one tiny window each, that opens directly into the hallway. Mine was never declared such undesirable features until booked and paid for . Intentionally deceptive? 
-Noise or regular spoken words from the hallway and the adjacent rooms  were constantly vividly audible  as the walls  were quite thin making it impossible for resting let alone sleeping.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Clean
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Be wary staying here
reviews.text: We are very flexible travellers and do not intend to pointlessly write negative reviews about a hotel. We have travelled around the world for the past 6 months and this was by far the worst hotel we have stayed. On arrival they refused to grant us our room early without paying a 300,000 VND charge. When we entered the room the entire rear facing wall was covered in damp spores and the room smelt very musty. We ignored this, however, not intending to complain. After an afternoon nap I awoke totally covered in little black ants which were all over our bed. When I called reception they did not seem surprised and showed us to another room. Guess what, the same thing happened. We were shown three rooms in total all of which had this problem. It was evident that they have an infestation at this hotel and I asked for my money back. On doing so they showed us into a penthouse suite on the top floor which, fortunately, was ant free. The staff are rude and laugh at you if you have an issue.

reviews.title: Will recommend to Friends for Sun city hotel stays
reviews.positives: Good location n very good prices very closely walked to Beaches n almost a Ocean Front 👍
reviews.negatives: Very nearby Trân Phú Beaches

reviews.title: Just Check other hotel
reviews.text: I stayed 5 nights in this apparently 3 stars hotel but is far away from it. The Hotel entry is located in an alley. During the check-in I discovered that they will keep my passport and after I asked to give me back they told me I must pay 1.000US$ in cash instead of the typical caution on the Credit Card. The best in this hotel was the room. Very spacious and fortunately an interior room. Fortunately because the road is very crowded and even during the night there were lots of cars honking all the time. The breakfast was ok but the hygienic conditions were a bit bad. First of all the waitresses were smoking inside the breakfast room and even the cooker was smoking and handling the food at the same time. The employees were always at the mobile phone, didn’t speak English and most of them didn’t say just a simple Hi! The pool area was also very dirty.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Céntrico, vistas desde la azotea, la piscina., cerca de restaurantes.
reviews.negatives: Nada que ndicar

reviews.title: Never before never again
reviews.text:
This is an example of how a hotel can rate high but be shockingly bad.
Good staff good location and clean. 
Rooms have windows but dirty. 
Great location but in a small busy alley way which can be dangerous to enter due to tragic. 
It has a kettle but no coffee, water. Milk or even coffee cups.
It  has a pool but they have no towels.
The girls on reception and staff were lovely. 
It as I said rates high due to rating system but give it a miss

reviews.title: hotel facilities is not good,reception staff is not polite enough
reviews.text: The room is not clean well,the quilts is still dirty.even we won’t use the wash tools,but they don’t offer us.finally we add 600000vnd/night,and we stay there 3nights,we book the room is cannot live people inside,cannot breathe.

reviews.title: Bien
reviews.positives: Ubicación excelente, habitaciones cómodas y limpias.
reviews.negatives: Nuestro baño estuvo tapado desde el principio... luego de hacer el n°2😉 se tapó aún más lo cual le comunicamos a recepción y solo nos dejaron una sopapa en el baño, intentamos destaparlo y nunca pudimos, así que teníamos que usar el baño de la piscina, el cual quedaba 10 pisos más arriba y era algo bastante incómodo.

reviews.title: Overated hotel
reviews.text: Booked and paid for 2 nights but only stayed 1 and moved to other hotel. The hotel is rated 3 stars but clearly don't meet the standard. The room is not clean, small and smell. The towels are also not clean. The houskeepers are unfriendly. Not worth for the price.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.negatives:
Pedí una plancha y no quisieron dármela, diciendo que si quería me lo plancharian en su lavandería teniendo que pagar por ello,
Tampoco pusieron papel higiénico y el agua caliente tardaba mucho en salir.

reviews.positives: Not

reviews.title: Nous ne nous attendions pas à du luxe étant donné les prix  tres bas des nuits mais un minimum d’hygiène serait bienvenu
reviews.positives: Prix attractif
reviews.negatives: Très gros problème d’hygiène, personnel inactif

reviews.title: More than average
reviews.text:
The stay was average and we will not come back. One reason lies on the staff attention. We arrived late on the evening and we surely not lucky, but this is a problem of good cleaning, the room was filled with columns of ants going all around the beds and the bedside tables and the head of the beds to a source of food left. 
The problem is that when we asked the staff to do clean it, as we would for sure not sleep with ants, one unhappy guy from the staff came (coz we disturbed him playing games on the computer in the lobby), with an insect killer spray and simply started to spray it all around the beds, walls where ants where, without caring at all spraying on the bed sheets, the pillows and the bedside tables as well... leaving all around huge traces of smelly and greasy marks of this insect killer spray... and the sadest is that if we didnt ask him to change all bed sheets, pillows and if I didnt clean myself the tables, we would have been left sleeping like that.. SO VERY POOR CUSTOMER CARE and a speech to the manager the next morning didnt change a thing, there was not even any apology.. SO DEFINITELY NOT RECOMMENDED.
reviews.positives: Room design

reviews.title: Belle emplacement. Propre. Sécurité misérable et incompréhensible.
reviews.positives: Proche de tout tres propre
reviews.negatives:
Ne perdez pas votre carte d accès à votre chambre.  Car ils vont vous facturer 150 000 dong 

Le problème se trouve au niveau de la sécurité de l endroit.  Si quelqu’un trouve votre carte.  Le numéro de votre chambre ci retrouve. Il peut entrer dans votre chambre et voler vos effets personnels.  I e argent, passeport et vêtements.   Parce que. Il vous remettra une nouvelle carte sans désactivé l ancienne carte perdue.  Si vous restez plusieurs jours à cette hôtel, le risque de vol s accentue    Ils m ont répondu que nous connaissons nos clients et qu il n y a pas de risque de vol Wow. Comme réponse.   La réception est ouverte 24/24 sans demande d accès à hôtel. ( pas besoin de carte pour rentrer dans l hôtel 

Se sont des normes de sécurité qui date des années 90.

J ai demandé de changer de chambre.  Je plains le prochain occupant pour sa sécurité 

C’est désolant car c’est une belle hôtel près de tout 



Pensez y deux fois avant de réserver

Le personnel est adorable. Nous avons pu annuler une réservation de plongée avec eux le matin même à cause de la pluie sans rien payer!

reviews.title: never stay here again
reviews.text: The breakfast was poor, there were ants in my drink. The room didn't have a view and there was a construction site next tot the hotel which started early. Also we had ants all over our room and the shower was cold for 3 days. The staff forgot to help us with our traintickets we asked for. But you can easily buy them at the station.
reviews.positives: close to the beach, but that was it

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.negatives: Un peu vieux

reviews.title: Agréable personnel sympathique et disponible.piscine suffisante pour y Nager. A recommander.

reviews.title: Generally not bad, but could be better.
reviews.text:
Cons: great location, big variety of food available for breakfast, hot water in the shower, great price and “ok” WiFi signal
Pros: staff barely speak English, facilities are not very clean, rooms are dated.

reviews.title: Séjour toujours très agréable
reviews.positives:
Nous avions déjà séjourné 15 jours dans cet hôtel en mars 2025.
Hôtel très bien situé, établissement très accueillant et propre, personnel très serviable. Chambre impeccable. 
Nous y reviendrons en février ou mars 2026...
reviews.negatives: Rien, tout est ok

reviews.title: Only if limited options
reviews.text:
Wanted to keep my passport, and rude about it.
Only hotel I have stayed in, in this price range, with no toiletries provided, sums up the approach.

reviews.title: Comfortable Hotel des années  80 - 90
reviews.positives:
Chambre  au 12 e étage vue mer et  baie de Nha Trang à  gauche et à droite de la baie vitrée . En face c’est la façade arrière du Novotel . 
Grande chambre très propre avec chaises , tables .
Lit ni trop dur ni trop mou . 
Vieux mobilier en très bon état . Tout fonctionne 
Pas un bruit 
Petite piscine très agréable avec une très belle vue sur la baie . Piscine à l’ombre mais transats au soleil , on peut bronzer .
reviews.negatives:
Petit déjeuner buffet industriel bas de gamme infecte sauf le café , les fruits et les tomates ( mûres ) . 
J’ai quand même mangé . Ne suis pas tombé malade. 
Pas d’interrupteurs au niveau du lit pour éteindre les lumières . il faut se lever .

reviews.title: NIghtmare
reviews.text: This hotel was under a huge renovation project when I arrived however at no point during the booking process was I made aware of this. It was like living on a construction site with workman holding up the lift while shifting building materials from floor to floor. They were wet-cutting marble right outside my room door with water and dust filling my room. My shoes and trousers were clogged with muck and dust just by leaving my room to go outside. It is ridiculous to keep the hotel open for business when such extensive works are taking place but I guess that's Vietnam and their hunger to make money overtakes their desire to deliver a good customer experience. I had already paid upfront on the internet so couldn't really change hotels at that point so beware and contact the hotel directly first before booking. Agoda - You should be ashamed of yourself for working with hoteliers that behave like this. I have some graphic pictures as evidence. I wonder if Agoda are interested to provide better customer service than their partner hotel was...

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Lage
reviews.negatives: Sehr unfreundliches Personal, unsauber, wollten Reisepass als Sicherheit: unmöglich.

reviews.title: The room is not clean, it is enclosed, not soundproof, noisy, causing discomfort to the people inside.
reviews.text: The bedroom is a bit cramped, not well-ventilated, enclosed, and dim, causing discomfort and unease for those sleeping or resting. The blanket is not warm; it seems like a fitted sheet is being used instead of a proper blanket, making it feel cold and uncomfortable.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Dreckige Bettlacken/ Handtücher, im ganzen Zimmer roch es nach Abwasser, keine richtigen Duvets, keine Seife
Ameisen im Frühstücksbrötchenkorb.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The hotel looks spacious from the outside and seems elegant inside. The rooms and facilities are old and not clean. It's a bit far to walk to the beach, about 800m to get to the seafront. Breakfast is acceptable. The staff is enthusiastic. The hotel should change its management regarding cleanliness; the bathroom door is very dirty and the equipment is too old. I will not return.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
Lage in zweiter Reihe vom Strand ideal.
Zimmer-Upgrade auf Zimmer mit Meerblick
reviews.negatives: Leider hat das Hotel ein Problem mit Feuchtigkeit in den Zimmern. Dies konnte man im ersten Zimmer stark riechen, im zweiten Zimmer leicht besser, aber dafür sichtbar Schimmel an den Wänden

reviews.title: underwhelming
reviews.text: requested a no smoking room. However the entire time there the room smelled of smoke. we would come in from a hot day and be immidiately suffocated by the smell. Our fridge didn't work as well it woukdnt close all the way and failed to keep our drinks cold. Staff was friendly enough but with the lack of cleanliness and upkeep on the room the experience overall was disappointing and underwhelming

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Wir haben dieses Hotel zur Überbrückung zwischen der Abfahrt des Nachtzugs spät abends und dem Checkout in unserem vorherigen Hotel in Nha Trang gebucht.
Das Personal war sehr freundlich. Wir hatten das Zimmer ohne Fenster gebucht und beim CheckIn ein Upgrade auf eines mit Fenster bekommen.
Es war mit 8€/Nacht sehr günstig. Der Checkout um 21h abends hat ebenfalls problemlos funktioniert.
reviews.negatives: Das Zimmer stank muffig. Wir haben an verschiedenen Stellen Schimmel entdeckt und es muss mehrere Wasserschäden gegeben haben. Wir haben wegen der Zugfahrt dort nicht übernachtet. Ich habe mich wegen des Geruchs (Zimmer im 6. Stock) nicht wohl gefühlt. Der Rest vom Zimmer und Bad war aber alles ok und sauber!

reviews.title: The street is  not suitable for a 16 seater bus to get in to unload luggage
reviews.text: not the best service because they scraped out luggages on the road. And hard for parking busses, small elevator, takes a long time to transport people up and down. Walking is faster than taking the elevator because when it comes to our level it’s full we can’t get in

reviews.title: Hotel maintenance
reviews.text: Typical of older Vietnamese hotels the upkeep of the facilities needs to be addressed.  The drains in the shower area are so plugged up that standing water is in the total bathroom when one takes a shower.  There are many other hotels that can be tried for the same price.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Die Lage und das Personal waren gut.
reviews.negatives: Das Frühstück war leider echt zum schämen

reviews.title: Average hotel
reviews.text:
Staff were just okay.  They didn't go out of there way to please but weren't rude either.

Location was down a back ally but the ally was clean and felt safe

Our room was okay.  It could have been cleaned better.   One complaint I have is the our room had a window to the hallway and there was a light directly outside the window which was very annoying.  We tried our best to cover the window.     

The only other complaint I have is that breakfast was poorly stocked.  The ran out of foods such as bacon every day.  And they had very little fruit which was supper disappointing being in a place where the have an abundance of delicious fruit available.

reviews.title: Gut wenn einem Geräusche und Frühstück nicht wichtig sind
reviews.positives: Nah am Strand, viele Essensmöglichkeiten in der Nähe und das Personal ist sehr freundlich.
reviews.negatives:
Man hat den Aufzug immer "ding dong" machen hören wenn man im Bett lag. 
Frühstück hatte keine vegetarischen Optionen außer Rührei/Spiegelei auf der Karte (wir konnten bei einem Gericht aber immerhin das Fleisch abbestellen).

reviews.title: Bad attitude staff
reviews.text: Staff need to train more

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Top Lage, zentral trotzdem sehr ruhig. 
Alles in der Nähe, in 3 Minuten direkt zum Strand...
reviews.negatives: Recht wenige Angestellte können sich sprachlich in englisch verständlich machen...

reviews.title: Good location, yet uncomfortable living
reviews.text: The location is very convenient for travelling around. Nice swiming pool on rooftop! However, facility and service are quite disappointing. The room floor is dirty when we first come. The bathroom is always in wetness. Some facilities are not well-equipped from the first day. Generally, we don't think it worths the pay.

reviews.title: Alles bestens!
reviews.positives:
Schon mehrmals dort übernachtet und immer sehr zufrieden!
Sehr sauber, renovierte Zimmer, gute Ausstattung, bequeme Betten, saubere Bettwäsche, Bettdecken in Überzügen, flauschige Badetücher, Trinkwasser täglich usw.  Alles was man sich für einen Hotelaufenthalt wünscht! :))
Das Personal ist äußerst freundlich, zuvorkommend und hilfsbereit!!
Vielen Dank für den angenehmen Aufenthalt!! :))

reviews.title: Hotel is ok
reviews.text: The hotel is fine, but not so great. Customer service (especially at the reception) can be improved. Breakfast menu is limited but with this price range, I don't complain much. Deluxe room is smaller that I thought and you can't really access wifi from the room. I don't think I'll ever return despite the hotel's very central location.
reviews.positives: central location, near the beach & other attractions

reviews.title: Alles bestens! Ein sehr angenehmer Aufenthalt!

Sehr freundliches, hilfsbereites und kompetentes Personal - Rezeption und Zimmermädchen -
Strand- und Zentrumsnähe!
Trotzdem, da Seitenstraße, relativ ruhig.
Rundum zum Wohlfühlen!!
Vielen Dank!! 
Immer gerne wieder!! :))

Giải quyết khiếu nại chậm chạp và cứng nhắc. Nhân viên gây khó khăn trong việc sắp xếp phòng khác cho khách. Bắt khách phải chuyển hẳn sang phòng khác, view không đẹp như phòng đặt trên booking. Lẽ ra nên sắp xếp cho khách ở tạm phòng khác để chờ đợi đúng phòng đặt ban đầu.

reviews.title: Close to the beach
reviews.text: We stayed at the Sunshine hotel for 4 nights, the main big problem we had was that they were building a new hotel next door and the noise was very annoying it started at about 7am and went on most of the day till about 5pm, the breakfast was basic but enough to get you by, the room was ok, and the staff was very friendly, there is no kettle in the room but they did give us a flask with hot water to make coffee I would recommend the hotel but be aware of the noise for a while yet

reviews.title: Primitive Back Room Staff
reviews.text:
Overall a decent hotel; rooms modern and well equipped; front room staff were efficient, but the cleaning and restaurant staff were primitive, undisciplined and untrained. The murky swimming pool water quality didn't meet the standards needed to swim in, I couldn't see the bottom even at the shallow end.  
They confiscate your passport on check in and you don't see it again until you check out which I found a little disconcerting. Buffet breakfast is above average. Two small elevators were a little slow and busy especially in the mornings.  Wifi worked ok on the 4th floor. Left some of my own t-bags by the kettle which the cleaning staff threw out. Location is absolutely central and rooms generally quiet as the hotel is situated down a quiet alleyway.

reviews.title: Average but for it's location...
reviews.text: Probably the best feature of the Sun City Hotel in Nha Trang is it's location.  There are about five other hotels on the same road though so it's not an exclusively excellent location.  On it's road are many services all in close proximity, including restaurants, shops, massage parlors, etc.  The staff are competent and willing to make effort to please.  The room was  a bit small and has the glass window to the toilet, disconcerting for Westerners (no on wants to be observed in their private moments).  The pool was small, with just a couple uncomfortable metal lounge chairs, not really enticing, however, the view from the pool was wonderful.  The breakfast was average although they had a wide variety of unusual foods.  I'd have to say that although it can be considered worth the money, there are better choices.  DRC

reviews.title: Good budget Hotel
reviews.text: For the cost this is a nice place to stay, just don't expect 5 star hotel service and perks. Staff is friendly and rooms are kept clean. Location is latterly across the road from the beach area. Breakfast in Hotel is minimal, little variety, but what is served is good quality. If you want food, many restaurants around the hotel near hotel with. This is mainly a backpacker hotel, but hotel staff tries hard to accomadate guest requests. I enjoyed my stay in this hotel, with the proviso that this is a budget hotel, so don't expect 5 star service. Example ... I booked a train back to Ho Chi Minh, and hotel staff pointed out that due to my age I could get a 20 percent discount. That saved me money!

reviews.title: The attitude of staffs were super terrible.
reviews.text:
The location of hotel is good . It took me 5 minutes to walk to the beach. The equipment of room is new . The price is very ok . 
But the attitude of staffs were terrible. 
The male receptionist woke me up 2 times at 7 am in the morning to ask me question about laundry while i was sleeping very deeply. I sent laundry to them the afternoon before , but they never check immediately, never ask me immediately . And they woke me at 7 am and 7:15 am in the next morning to ask me .
I came to restaurant at 8 am to have breakfast . Everything was finished . No food at all. I asked a female staff to top up some more food . And the female staff answer me that " that's all we have. Eat or not up to you " . It was super terrible answer . How can no food at 8 am in the morning ? Have you seen any breakfast buffet almost finished at 8 am ? It was so bad .
So if you want to enjoy your sleep and wake up at 9 am then go for breakfast, you shouldnt book this hotel. Because the breakfast here finish very early. And the staffs dont want to top up more food.
The boss of hotel need to teach all staffs again. 
Everything is good , except staffs

reviews.title: Good Location with Friendly Staff
reviews.text:
I only stayed with my parents in this hotel for one night. The staff is pretty helpful when I called in for assistance as well as during my stay.

Regarding the surrounding, it is not so preferable. The hotel is situated at the end of a small road. There wasn't any decent food around at late hour because we arrived rather late. They are expanding the hotel so in the morning, you can hear the construction noise (fine for me because I was up pretty early). Room is a bit small though for 3 of us. Although the room is clean, I think it can do better by providing items with better quality in the room (blanket, shower, wash basin, etc.)

Apart from a few to-be-improved point, the hotel is situated at great location, walking distance to the beach. The restaurant on top got a good view of the beach & the square below, although the food is not so good.

Personally I think this hotel is great if you are young & on budget, looking for a good hotel location & cleanliness. Other than that, it is definitely not an ideal place if you are travelling with your family or got elderly in your group. Having said that, I think the room rate is reasonable for the service that they provide:)
reviews.positives: Friendly & helpful staff, Good Location and Cleanliness

reviews.positives: Gần biển và chợ đêm. Mình đi tầm 10 phút là ra tới biển. Kế ks có chỗ bán đồ ăn, vật dụng để tắm biển, bánh kẹo. NV nhiệt tình và dễ thương. Giá trên app phù hợp với chất lượng ks
reviews.negatives: Ks hơi cũ (phòng mình thì màng treo nhà tắm bị rách). Ga giường có vết dơ nhiều. Cửa phòng thì bị hở k đóng kín được

reviews.title: nice hotel in an average town
reviews.text: The room was rather small, but it was clean and tidy!! The staff was helpful and helped us with taxis and things. DO NOT DO THE 4 islands trip in Nah Trang, the water is dirty and full of rubbish!! No problem with the hotel though, also in a good area!!
reviews.positives: friendly staff, clean room, centrally located

reviews.title: Budget
reviews.text:
Staff at the Sun City were friendly and helpful. When we checked in we were shown to our room - weird layout in the bathroom, not clean and an awful smell in the wardrobe where the safe was located. Once we mentioned this to reception they informed us they would move us after the 1pm check out. New room was much better. Clean, better bathroom and no unpleasant smells. Wifi was very hit & miss.
Breakfast was average - not the best.
However, the hotel does has full facilities after you check out to hold your luggage for the day while you continue to explore the town and allow you to shower and relax in the foyer before you transfer on.

reviews.title: Good hotel near to beach
reviews.text: Hotel is close to beach/bars/ restaurants etc. Got put in a 'window room' first night- no view except into a building site 1m away from window. Moved to windowless room for cheaper. They moved us into a sea view room the following night for the remainder of the stay which was MUCH nicer! Staff very accomodating... even got a hufe bug out of out suitcase for us! Breakfast okay. Didn't use pool as building work going on next door so not very relaxing but beach so close it doesn't matter.

It will be better then tourist street (bike,loudly music). All staffs was helpful and good customer service.  But one thing is bad. The hotel next door had construction were noisy.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời về con người, mảnh đất Nha Trang. Đây là chuyến đi rất thú vị, vui vẻ.
reviews.positives:
Khách sạn gần biển, có thể đi bộ tắm vào sáng sớm và chiều. View sân thượng nhìn thẳng ra quảng trường 2/4 ngay dịp lễ hội thật tuyệt. Ban đêm có thể thấy vòng xoay mặt trời từ Vinpearl rõ ràng.

Nhân viên nhiệt tình chu đáo, có cho check in sớm khi có phòng. Tôi đi sự kiện 2h sáng, nhân viên đang ngủ vẫn thức dậy hỗ trợ nhiệt tình.
reviews.negatives: Buffet ngon, view đẹp tại tầng 15, mong đợi có món bánh canh chả cá đặc sản Nha Trang. Sau khi ăn thì đồ hơi bị ám mùi khói, đây là vấn đề nhỏ không đáng lưu ý.

reviews.title: COzy and warm
reviews.text: i will come back here soon. it is such a nice hotel with cozy atmosphere :)
reviews.positives: cozy, near centre, good service

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives:
Ks cho hỗ trợ mình nhận phòng sớm từ lúc 8h sáng. Mình rất cảm ơn vì điều này ❤️ Chị lễ tân nhiệt tình niềm nở. 
Ks ngay trung tâm, sân thượng có hồ bơi 1.4m, view sân thượng nhìn thấy biển, tháp Trầm Hương và Vinpearl. 
Phòng ngăn nắp sạch sẽ, đầy đủ tiện nghi
reviews.negatives: Máy điều hoà hơi ồn.

reviews.title: nice hotel

reviews.title: Good. Seriously only you need to upgrade your staff language level n certain staff politeness .
reviews.text:
Everything is great about the hotel. 
If the staffs able to make the difference by having better English n giving friendly service. 
Perhaps, with better command in language, we can understand both parties better.

You can survey yourself at Lantern Restaurant. Go and spend a few dong to buy yourself a meal, to experience the difference in level of customer service.

If they can do it, so r u.

If your staff standard is like that, u will have good comments filling up your review column. 

Lastly, Thank you for your hospitality.
Hope it will be better when I am back in future. As I see good future towards your hotel.

I had to request more bacon  four times & when after about 25 mons it arrived
